query: SQLite schema definition and table creation
notes: Schema const in store.go, migration logic in migrate.go

query: full text search FTS5 query implementation
notes: FTSSearch/FTSSearchFiles in store.go; builder.go drives the query and uses results

query: BFS graph traversal knowledge graph edges
notes: TraceEdges and TraceEdgesMulti use recursive CTE; builder.go calls TraceEdgesMulti for graph expansion

query: WebAssembly sandbox execution wazero
notes: sandbox.Run uses wazero runtime

query: Wasm parser malloc free parse ABI
notes: ParserManager.Parse in parser.go; indexer.go uses ParserManager to process files

query: Go AST symbol extraction function type variable
notes: extractGoSymbols uses go/ast; indexer.go dispatches to it and stores symbol nodes

query: token budget compression truncation context window
notes: Build fills token budget via estimateTokens/compress/compressFile

query: MCP tool registration handler BuildContext IndexProject
notes: handler.go has method implementations, registry.go registers them

query: incremental indexing hash change detection file walk
notes: readAndParseFile/writeParsedFile in indexer.go handle hash-based change detection and file walk

query: database schema migration user_version upgrade
notes: migrate() reads PRAGMA user_version and applies migrations

query: context building FTS graph expansion relevance scoring
notes: Build() in builder.go calls FTSSearchFiles/TraceEdgesMulti from store.go

query: Python symbol extraction def class heuristic
notes: extractPythonSymbols handles def/class/decorators

query: allowed root path validation security traversal
notes: resolveRoots enforces path prefix containment; main.go reads SIEVE_ALLOWED_ROOT env var

query: server startup MCP stdio SIEVE_ALLOWED_ROOT environment variable
notes: main.go reads env vars and starts server.ServeStdio

query: drill down directory branch context exploration
notes: DrillDown in builder.go; branch computation in builder_branches.go

query: PPMI co-occurrence BuildPPMI term neighbors corpus
notes: cooccur.go has BuildPPMI, ExpandQuery, document-level PPMI calculation

query: ExpandQuery SIEVE_QUERY_EXPANSION expand cooccur builder token
notes: ExpandQuery defined in cooccur.go; builder.go calls it when SIEVE_QUERY_EXPANSION is set

query: SplitIdentifiers camelCase PascalCase snake_case identifier split
notes: tokensplit.go implements SplitIdentifiers for FTS vocabulary expansion

query: augmentContent vocabulary FTS token content augment index
notes: augmentContent in tokensplit.go appends split tokens to file content before FTS indexing

query: FTSAugmentSentinel StripAugment sentinel strip augment content
notes: store.go has FTSAugmentSentinel/StripAugment; tokensplit.go calls FTSAugmentSentinel in augmentContent

query: resolveCrossFileCalls pendingCall nameIndex symbolEntry
notes: resolve.go implements pass-2 cross-file call edge resolution using nameIndex

query: SIEVE_SCORE_THRESHOLD threshold topComposite cutoff score relative
notes: builder.go reads SIEVE_SCORE_THRESHOLD and applies relative cutoff against topComposite

query: parsedFile parallel worker goroutine channel pipeline batch
notes: indexer.go implements 3-phase parallel parse pipeline with parsedFile channel

query: RestartServer restartCh exit channel signal process
notes: handler.go has RestartServer and restartCh field; main.go wires restartCh to os.Exit

query: Optimize PRAGMA WAL checkpoint analysis_limit SQLite
notes: store.go Optimize() runs PRAGMA analysis_limit=400; PRAGMA optimize and WAL checkpoint

query: Init initResponse newly_indexed auto-index optimized session
notes: handler.go Init() auto-indexes when empty, optimizes SQLite, returns initResponse

query: Status uptime node_count edge_count memory version server
notes: handler.go has Status() implementation; registry.go description lists uptime/version/node/edge/memory

query: ResetIndex yes-delete-all confirm wipe destructive guard
notes: handler.go has ResetIndex implementation; registry.go description mentions yes-delete-all and destructive guard

query: TypeScript JavaScript extractTSSymbols extractRustSymbols struct enum trait
notes: heuristic.go has extractTSSymbols and extractRustSymbols for non-Go languages

query: computeBranches directory branch path listing sorted coverage
notes: builder_branches.go computeBranches builds dir coverage stats and branch listing
